prd_version: v9 + FR-C10 Audience Register + FR-C11 HTML backup rule + FR-F7 Professor Checkpoints (added 2026-06-07)
gotchas_mastered: duplicate-url — dedup guard before appending a URL to coverage_map (study-prep, main.py:88)
transient-error — ConnectionError on fetch routed as TRANSIENT → skip, not crash (study-prep, main.py:107)
api-key-bypass — ANTHROPIC_API_KEY stripped from child-process env; auth via Max plan only (study-prep, main.py:215)
trust-fence — external content wrapped before reaching the LLM; prevents prompt injection from ingested data (study-prep, main.py:260)

gate_verdicts_summary.G2: demonstrated (study-prep — 10 model decisions captured in run log)
gate_verdicts_summary.G3: demonstrated partial (study-prep — loop closed, model varied queries; but trapped in zero-information feedback state caused by mock-DB perception trap)
gate_verdicts_summary.G4: demonstrated (study-prep — principled stop fired correctly at 10/10)

top_active_gaps: Perception-layer design — what makes a tool starvation-proof for the agent loop (Cycle 1, surfaced by mock-DB trap)
Phase F/F2 probe readiness — formal probe sequence not yet experienced (Cycle 1 structural)
G3 zero-information feedback — agent kept varying queries but never escalated to a different strategy (Cycle 1)

_agent_schema_note.description: Schema for each entry in agents[]. Written at end of cycle.

fields.slug: string — use-case-slug matching agents/ folder name
fields.date: ISO date when agent was delivered
fields.gates_passed: array of gate IDs e.g. [G1, G2, G3, G4, G5]

learning.probes_asked: array of strings — Phase F (pre-run) probes asked
learning.gaps: array of strings — concepts that came up weak in Phase F
learning.strengths: array of strings — concepts demonstrated correctly
learning.recall_question_next_cycle: string — weakest gap as a question for next cycle opening

post_run_notes.runtime_surprises: array of strings — things that surprised Ram in the runtime output (Phase F2)
post_run_notes.post_run_probes_asked: array of strings — probes asked during Phase F2
post_run_notes.next_cycle_expectation: string — what Ram predicts the next SDK rung will unlock
post_run_notes.skipped: boolean — true if Phase F2 was skipped without any interaction

_cross_cycle_fields_note.description: Top-level fields written/updated at the end of every cycle (step 8). Used by Phase 0 Session Warm-Up.
_cross_cycle_fields_note.gotchas_mastered: top-level array — cumulative plain-English GOTCHA[] annotations across all agents; appended each cycle, never overwritten
_cross_cycle_fields_note.report_card: top-level object — regenerated each cycle from full agents[]; fields: agents_understood[], sdk_rungs_introduced[], gate_verdicts_summary{}, domain_coverage{}, top_active_gaps[]

run_result.root_cause: mock_perception_trap — MOCK_SEARCH_DB exact-key lookup; model's natural-language queries never matched a stored key; all 10 searches returned empty

learning.skipped_reason: Ram redirected mid-cycle to spec rewrite + lay-first HTML refresh instead of running Phase F probes; comprehension check deferred to behaviour-evidence
gaps: Perception-layer design — what makes a tool starvation-proof for the agent loop
Phase F2 readiness — formal probe sequence not yet experienced
strengths: G4 principled stop — Ram correctly read the cap firing as success-not-failure during the insights HTML cold-read pass
G1/G2/G3 working model — confirmed by his framing 'the agent worked correctly, the world wasn't cooperating' during the §2 rewrite
learning.recall_question_next_cycle: When the safety cap fired at 10/10 in your last run, was the agent failing or succeeding? How can the agent tell the difference between an empty search result and an actual structural failure?

post_run_notes.next_cycle_expectation: Session memory (rung 3) will let the LLM itself carry context across calls — coverage_map injection no longer needed

candidates.name: Morning Spark
candidates.notes: Recommended for Cycle 1; deferred. Still eligible for Cycle 2 if extended to rung 3.

candidates.name: Study Prep Agent
candidates.notes: Locked 2026-06-07 Cycle 1. FORWARD — introduces rungs 1+2. Goal predicate: is_coverage_met(coverage_map). Tools: search_web + fetch_page (mocked). max_iterations=10. Delivered 2026-06-07 17:35; cap reached due to mock-DB perception trap (not agent failure).

candidates.name: Focus Booster
candidates.notes: G3 weak — environment unchanged between iterations. Fix: add probe_log(question) tool so the model's question shapes what it observes next. Eligible for Cycle 2+ if fix applied.
